Title: A Comprehensive Gene Inventory for Glucosinolate Biosynthetic Pathway in Arabidopsis thaliana
Journal: Journal of Agricultural and Food Chemistry

Common_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Bile acid: sodium symporter family protein
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Reduces aliphatic GSL levels when defective; directs 2-oxo acids into chloroplast
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for manipulating GSL distribution
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Chloroplastic transporter that directs 2-oxo acids into chloroplast. 2. bat5 mutant shows reduced aliphatic GSL levels. 3. Involved in side-chain elongation process of aliphatic GSL biosynthesis.

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Mediates translocation of aliphatic and indolic GSLs to seeds; controls GSL distribution between roots and shoots
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for manipulating GSL distribution in plants
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Encodes GSL transporter that mediates translocation of both aliphatic and indolic GSLs to seeds. 2. gtr1 gtr2 mutants show over-accumulation of GSLs in rosettes and siliques. 3. Controls GSL distribution between roots and shoots.

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Mediates translocation of aliphatic and indolic GSLs to seeds; controls GSL distribution between roots and shoots
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for manipulating GSL distribution in plants
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Encodes GSL transporter that mediates translocation of both aliphatic and indolic GSLs to seeds. 2. gtr1 gtr2 mutants show over-accumulation of GSLs in rosettes and siliques. 3. Controls GSL distribution between roots and shoots.

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Transports sulfate; expression increases under sulfur deficiency
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Sulfate transporter involved in GSL biosynthesis. 2. Expression increases in sulfur-deficient transgenic Arabidopsis plants. 3. Belongs to sulfate permease (Su1P) family.

Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Transports sulfate; expression increases under sulfur deficiency
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Sulfate transporter involved in GSL biosynthesis. 2. Expression increases in sulfur-deficient transgenic Arabidopsis plants. 3. Belongs to sulfate permease (Su1P) family.

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Initiates chain elongation by deaminating methionine to produce 2-oxo acid
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for engineering aliphatic GSL profiles
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Initiates aliphatic GSL side-chain elongation by deaminating methionine. 2. Produces 2-oxo acid from methionine. 3. Involved in transamination process converting chain-elongated 2-oxo acids to amino acids.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Deaminates methionine to produce 2-oxo acid
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Forms immediate precursor for chain elongation

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Catalyzes condensation of acetyl-CoA with 2-oxo acid; involved in biosynthesis via two elongation cycles
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Key enzyme for controlling chain length diversity
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Methylthioalkylmalate synthase involved in aliphatic GSL biosynthesis. 2. Participates in two elongation cycles. 3. Located in GSL-ELONG locus controlling diverse aliphatic GSLs.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Condenses acetyl-CoA with 2-oxo acid producing methylthioalkylmalate intermediate

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Involved in production of aliphatic GSLs derived from one, five, and six elongation cycles; also involved in phenylalanine chain elongation
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: In vitro assays and genetic studies
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Broad substrate specificity useful for engineering diverse GSL profiles
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Methylthioalkylmalate synthase involved in aliphatic GSL biosynthesis. 2. Produces aliphatic GSLs from one, five, and six elongation cycles. 3. Also involved in chain elongation of phenylalanine for aromatic GSLs.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Condenses acetyl-CoA with 2-oxo acid producing methylthioalkylmalate intermediate

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Catalyzes isomerization in chain elongation process
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Isopropylmalate isomerase involved in aliphatic GSL side-chain elongation. 2. Catalyzes isomerization step. 3. Co-expressed with aliphatic GSL transcription factor MYB28.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Isomerizes methylthioalkylmalate intermediate

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Catalyzes isomerization in chain elongation process
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Isopropylmalate isomerase involved in aliphatic GSL side-chain elongation. 2. Catalyzes isomerization step. 3. Co-expressed with aliphatic GSL transcription factor MYB28.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Isomerizes methylthioalkylmalate intermediate

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Isomerizes methylthioalkylmalate intermediate

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Catalyzes oxidative decarboxylation in chain elongation process
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Isopropylmalate dehydrogenase involved in aliphatic GSL side-chain elongation. 2. Catalyzes oxidative decarboxylation step. 3. Co-expressed with aliphatic GSL transcription factor MYB28.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Oxidative decarboxylation of isomerized intermediate
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Produces chain-elongated precursor for core synthesis

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Isopropylmalate dehydrogenase involved in aliphatic GSL side-chain elongation. 2. Catalyzes oxidative decarboxylation step.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Oxidative decarboxylation of isomerized intermediate
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Produces chain-elongated precursor for core synthesis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Catalyzes oxidative decarboxylation in chain elongation process
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Isopropylmalate dehydrogenase involved in aliphatic GSL side-chain elongation. 2. Catalyzes oxidative decarboxylation step.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Oxidative decarboxylation of isomerized intermediate
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Produces chain-elongated precursor for core synthesis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Catalyzes transamination converting chain-elongated 2-oxo acids to amino acids
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Branched-chain amino acid aminotransferase involved in aliphatic GSL side-chain elongation. 2. Catalyzes transamination converting chain-elongated 2-oxo acids to amino acids. 3. Chloroplastic localization.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Transaminates chain-elongated 2-oxo acids to corresponding amino acids
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Produces elongated amino acid precursors for core synthesis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Catalyzes transamination converting chain-elongated 2-oxo acids to amino acids
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Branched-chain amino acid aminotransferase involved in aliphatic GSL side-chain elongation. 2. Catalyzes transamination converting chain-elongated 2-oxo acids to amino acids. 3. Cytosolic localization.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Transaminates chain-elongated 2-oxo acids to corresponding amino acids
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Produces elongated amino acid precursors for core synthesis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Converts all chain-elongated methionine derivatives to aldoximes
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Key enzyme for aliphatic GSL core structure initiation
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Cytochrome P450 enzyme involved in aliphatic GSL core structure synthesis. 2. Converts all chain-elongated methionine derivatives to aldoximes.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Converts chain-elongated methionine derivatives to aldoximes

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Converts long-chained methionine derivatives to aldoximes
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Cytochrome P450 enzyme involved in aliphatic GSL core structure synthesis. 2. Specifically converts long-chained methionine derivatives to aldoximes.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Converts long-chained methionine derivatives to aldoximes

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Converts aliphatic aldoximes to activated aci-nitro compounds
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Key oxidation step in core synthesis
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Cytochrome P450 enzyme involved in aliphatic GSL core structure synthesis. 2. Converts aliphatic aldoximes to activated aci-nitro compounds.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Oxidizes aliphatic aldoximes to activated aci-nitro compounds

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Contributes to aliphatic GSL biosynthesis; reduction in long-chained aliphatic GSLs in mutants
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Cytochrome b5 involved in aliphatic GSL biosynthesis. 2. Co-expressed with GSL biosynthetic genes. 3. Mutants show reduced production of long-chained aliphatic GSLs.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Acts as electron donor for P450 enzymes
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Electron transfer partner for cytochrome P450 enzymes

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Converts aci-nitro compound to GSH conjugate
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Glutathione S-transferase involved in aliphatic GSL core structure synthesis. 2. Converts aci-nitro compound to GSH conjugate.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Conjugates activated aci-nitro compound with glutathione
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Forms conjugated intermediate for further processing

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Converts aci-nitro compound to GSH conjugate
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Glutathione S-transferase involved in aliphatic GSL core structure synthesis. 2. Converts aci-nitro compound to GSH conjugate.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Conjugates activated aci-nitro compound with glutathione
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Forms conjugated intermediate for further processing

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Metabolizes GSH conjugate to produce Cys-Gly conjugates
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Gamma-glutamyl peptidase involved in GSL core structure synthesis. 2. Metabolizes GSH conjugate to produce Cys-Gly conjugates. 3. Functions in both aliphatic and indolic GSL pathways.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Cleaves gamma-glutamyl bond in GSH conjugate
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Processes conjugated intermediate for C-S cleavage

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Forms thiohydroximates from S-alkyl-thiohydroximate; reduced aliphatic and aromatic GSLs in mutants
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Key enzyme in core structure formation
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. C-S lyase involved in GSL core structure synthesis. 2. Forms thiohydroximates from S-alkyl-thiohydroximate. 3. sur1 mutant shows reduced levels of aliphatic and aromatic GSLs.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Functions in all three GSL types (aliphatic, indolic, aromatic)
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Cleaves C-S bond in S-alkyl-thiohydroximate to form thiohydroximate
Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Aliphatic, indolic, and aromatic glucosinolate biosynthesis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Glucosylates thiohydroximate group to form desulfoglucosinolates
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. UDP-glycosyltransferase involved in GSL core structure synthesis. 2. Glucosylates thiohydroximate group to form desulfoglucosinolates. 3. First enzyme determined to glucosylate thiohydroximate group.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Functions in all three GSL types
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Transfers glucose from UDP-glucose to thiohydroximate
Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Aliphatic, indolic, and aromatic glucosinolate biosynthesis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Involved in biosynthesis of aliphatic GSLs; co-expressed with met-derived GSL genes
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Phylogenetic analysis, gene expression, knockout study (ugt74c1-2 mutant)
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. UDP-glycosyltransferase involved in aliphatic GSL biosynthesis. 2. Co-expressed with met-derived GSL genes. 3. Knockout mutant studies support its involvement.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Not found in KEGG or AraCyc databases but has literature evidence
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Glucosylates thiohydroximate intermediates

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Sulfates desulfoGSLs to form intact GSLs; favors long-chained aliphatic GSLs
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Sulfotransferase involved in GSL core structure synthesis. 2. Sulfates desulfoGSLs to form intact GSLs. 3. Favors long-chained aliphatic GSLs like desulfo-7-methylthioheptyl GSL and desulfo-8-methylthiooctyl GSL.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Functions in both aliphatic and indolic GSL pathways
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Transfers sulfate from PAPS to desulfoglucosinolate
Pathway_Genes.Metabolic_Step_Position: Terminal step in core structure synthesis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Sulfates desulfoGSLs to form intact GSLs; favors long-chained aliphatic GSLs
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Sulfotransferase involved in aliphatic GSL core structure synthesis. 2. Sulfates desulfoGSLs to form intact GSLs. 3. Favors long-chained aliphatic GSLs.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Transfers sulfate from PAPS to desulfoglucosinolate
Pathway_Genes.Metabolic_Step_Position: Terminal step in core structure synthesis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Initiates side-chain modification via S-oxygenation from methylthioalkyl to methylsulfinylalkyl GSL
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant defense against pathogens and herbivores; human health benefits
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Flavin monooxygenase involved in aliphatic GSL side-chain modification. 2. Initiates S-oxygenation from methylthioalkyl to methylsulfinylalkyl GSL.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: S-oxygenates methylthioalkyl GSL to methylsulfinylalkyl GSL
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Modifies side chain for further diversification
